product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm really interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. I was wondering if there might be any room for negotiation on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: That's an excellent choice! The LG C3 65-inch OLED is truly exceptional, especially with its stunning OLED evo panel and advanced gaming features. It's priced at $1,799, but I'm open to hearing what kind of offer you had in mind.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I'm very interested in the C3. Would you be able to do $1450 for it?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer. The LG C3 is a premium TV, offering incredible value with its OLED evo panel and comprehensive features. While $1450 is a bit lower than we can typically go, I could meet you at $1650 to make sure you can enjoy this fantastic TV.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand it's a premium TV. How about we meet at $1500?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you coming up to $1500. This TV truly delivers an immersive experience. To ensure you get the best possible deal on this top-tier model, I can offer it to you for $1600.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I'm really trying to stick to a tighter budget. Could we do $1525?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand you're working with a budget. The LG C3's picture quality and features are unmatched. To help you get this incredible TV, I can offer it to you for $1575.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I'm very keen on it. How about $1550?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Alright, $1550 is a very competitive price for the LG C3 65-inch OLED. I can agree to that to get this fantastic TV into your home today.
